title: Old Wolves
description: A resource pack that brings back the old wolves and gets rid of the new breeds!
body:
A resource pack that brings back the old wolves and gets rid of the new breeds!
basically a resource pack for anyone who doesn't like/want the new wolfs but still want to play on the newest version!

**Example:**

![ExampleOfPack.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f8bbe9f7ba289acf170476c4b87f482f3959a87.gif)

**As always, have fun!
And thank you for any support <3**
